capabilities: Integrate task decomposition with software testing to define success metrics and validation steps for parent procedures.

procedure.action: Capture detailed task specifications using user stories and acceptance criteria using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assert task specifications by conducting peer reviews and walkthroughs by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Inject measurable criteria and metrics using SMART goals for each decomposed task by injecting the component into the dependency graph; assert inject_success = true and circular_dependency_count < 1; log injection_target and injection_time_ms.

Assert procedure output by running unit tests with >90% code coverage by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Conduct integration tests to ensure decomposed tasks work cohesively using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Inspect test results and iterate on task decomposition based on feedback by applying the checklist line by line; assert mandatory_item_fail_count < 1; log review_duration_ms and reviewer_id to review_log.

summary: Establish a robust evaluation framework for task decomposition strategies by integrating software testing principles, ensuring measurable success and validation of procedures.
title: Task Decomposition Strategy Evaluation

failureConditions: Inadequate task specifications lead to incomplete decomposition; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Lack of measurable criteria results in ambiguous success evaluation.

Insufficient testing causes undetected integration issues; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: task specifications by conducting peer reviews and walkthroughs by asserting all required fields conform to the schema d
procedure output by running unit tests with >90% code coverage by asserting all required fields conform to the schema de
successConditions: Ensure all tasks have defined acceptance criteria and metrics; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify unit test coverage is above 90% for decomposed tasks; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Confirm integration tests pass without errors; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Review feedback loop for continuous improvement; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
